17Isaac Z. Schlueter
Node.js Package Manager Creator

SCOUTING REPORT

Isaac Z. Schlueter revolutionizes JavaScript development with npm, the world's largest software registry. His work fosters collaboration and innovation, making it easier for developers to share and reuse code.
